description:
Ibiza! Our first party on the island in two years was a night filled with club classics as we handed the reins to Charli xcx.

This edition of PARTYGIRL features special guests George Daniel, Alex Chapman & Zoe Gitter and The Dare.

►  Listen to Boiler Room’s archive on Apple Music: https://apple.co/BoilerRoom
